description: Mutation definitions for simple_sort.ps1 - Light Mutation Testing

mutations.name: Get-RegionScore IndexOf sign flip
mutations.description: Flip subtraction to addition - breaks region priority scoring

mutations.name: VersionScore descending flip
mutations.description: Flip Descending to Ascending - breaks version preference

mutations.name: Remove empty GameKey fallback
mutations.description: Remove fallback protection for empty keys - allows empty keys

mutations.name: Remove __DUP collision suffix
mutations.description: Remove duplicate suffix generation - causes overwrites

mutations.name: Swap EU/US region priority
mutations.description: Swap EU and US region order - breaks expected priority

mutations.name: Remove language tag guard
mutations.description: Remove check that prevents language codes as region - misidentifies Fr/De

mutations.name: Remove HtmlEncode
mutations.description: Replace HtmlEncode with identity - breaks XSS protection

mutations.name: Ignore tool exit code
mutations.description: Always succeed tool execution - ignores errors

mutations.name: Skip missing track validation
mutations.description: Remove track file validation for CUE/GDI - breaks integrity check

mutations.name: Remove XML error handling
mutations.description: Remove try-catch for DAT parsing - crashes on bad XML

mutations.name: Remove path traversal check
mutations.description: Remove .. sanitization - allows path traversal attacks

mutations.name: Remove CSV injection prefix
mutations.description: Remove = prefix escaping - allows CSV formula injection

mutations.name: Version score revision multiplier removal
mutations.description: Reduce revision impact so Rev A/B ordering weakens

mutations.name: Winner deterministic path order flip
mutations.description: Flip MainPath sort direction to break deterministic winner selection

mutations.name: Disable reparse-point root protection
mutations.description: Bypass reparse-point blocking in Test-PathWithinRoot

mutations.name: Lower CHD format preference
mutations.description: Mutate CHD format score so archives may be preferred

mutations.name: Skip source removal after conversion
mutations.description: Disable source cleanup in conversion pipeline

mutations.name: Invert cartridge size tie-break sign
mutations.description: Prefer larger cartridge files by removing negative multiplier

mutations.name: Disable multi-region WORLD detection
mutations.description: Break WORLD classification for mixed region names

mutations.name: Disable always-alias mapping
mutations.description: Break canonical title mapping (e.g., Rockman -> Mega Man)

mutations.name: Remove duplicate suffix collision strategy
mutations.description: Break destination conflict handling in move logic

mutations.name: Disable post-extraction root validation
mutations.description: Allow zip-slip style entry paths after extraction

mutations.name: Disable reparse-point directory skip in scanner
mutations.description: Allow traversal into reparse points during scan

mutations.name: Disable cancellation checks in dedupe
mutations.description: Make long loops ignore cancellation requests
